parameters.query:
=INSERT INTO email_threads (
  thread_id,
  type,
  supplier_id,
  client_id,
  direction,
  subject,
  from_email,
  from_name,
  to_email,
  last_message,
  last_received_at,
  summary,
  sentiment,
  key_topics,
  action_items,
  extracted_data,
  needs_response,
  priority
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.thread_id }}',
  '{{ $json.type }}',
  {{ $json.type === 'supplier' ? "'" + $json.entity_id + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.type === 'client' ? "'" + $json.entity_id + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.direction }}',
  $${{ $json.subject }}$$,
  '{{ $json.from_email }}',
  $${{ $json.from_name }}$$,
  '{{ $json.to_email }}',
  $${{ $json.last_message }}$$,
  '{{ $json.last_received_at }}',
  $${{ $json.summary }}$$,
  '{{ $json.sentiment }}',
  '{{ $json.key_topics }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ $json.action_items }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ $json.extracted_data }}'::jsonb,
  {{ $json.needs_response }},
  '{{ $json.priority }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (thread_id) DO UPDATE SET
  last_message = EXCLUDED.last_message,
  last_received_at = EXCLUDED.last_received_at,
  summary = EXCLUDED.summary,
  sentiment = EXCLUDED.sentiment,
  key_topics = EXCLUDED.key_topics,
  action_items = EXCLUDED.action_items,
  extracted_data = EXCLUDED.extracted_data,
  needs_response = EXCLUDED.needs_response,
  priority = EXCLUDED.priority,
  direction = EXCLUDED.direction,
  message_count = email_threads.message_count + 1,
  updated_at = now()
RETURNING *;

nodes.name: Send Urgent Notification
nodes.notes: Configurar con tu chat ID de Telegram

nodes.name: Log Unmatched
nodes.notes: Opcional: guardar en tabla de emails no procesados
